enabled.label: Enable HTML Sanitization
enabled.help: Enable or disable HTML sanitization globally. When enabled, user-submitted HTML content will be cleaned to remove potentially dangerous tags and attributes.

allowed_css_properties.label: Allowed CSS Properties
allowed_css_properties.help: Array of CSS properties that are allowed in inline styles. Any other CSS properties will be stripped during sanitization.

allowed_tags.label: Allowed HTML Tags
allowed_tags.help: Optional: Specify an array of allowed HTML tags. If not set, a default safe list will be used. Example: ["p", "strong", "em", "a", "ul", "ol", "li"]

allowed_iframe_domains.label: Allowed iFrame Domains
allowed_iframe_domains.help: Optional: Specify an array of domains that are allowed for iframe embeds. Example: ["www.youtube.com", "player.vimeo.com"]
